message:
refactor: deduplicate split dimension logic, consolidate tests

- Extract finishNewPanel() for shared post-create pattern (send command +
  return JSON) used by both split-window and new-window handlers
- Simplify split-window dimension derivation: get full w/h first, halve
  after, removing duplicated horizontal/vertical branches
- Simplify new-window viewport lookup with inline block expression
- Use orelse-return in sendCommandToPanel instead of if-unwrap
- Consolidate percentDecode tests (11 → 2 tests via expectDecode helper)
- Consolidate hexDigit tests (4 → 1 test)
- Remove duplicate JsonArrayIterator and key-lookup integration tests
  already covered by existing tests. Net -116 lines.
